posts.author: Han (Kuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com senior expert,

I notice the function of “manage duplicates” is gone in my enterprise account, but the individual account still works well.

Question:
(1) Who can do the “manage duplicates?” It seems only the account administrator can do it now
(2) Random one. When we do the “manage duplicates”, will the archived item data be considered for merge?

image1331×547 64.7 KB

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
@pereljon @Han This function has been moved to the monday CRM product. Regardless of your license level (PRO, ENT, etc…) you still need to sign up (and pay more) for these additional features.

Don’t shoot the messenger…
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Han,

We also recommend looking into the apps marketplace for apps that help manage duplicates in your account
